name: spec-bifrost-marketplace
description: Spec Bifrost Claude Code 插件市场，用于分发需求原型插件。Marketplace for the Spec Bifrost Claude Code plugin for requirement prototyping.

plugins.name: spec-bifrost
plugins.description: 基于本地 JSON 创建、校验、预览并导出页面驱动的 B 端需求原型。Create, validate, preview, and export page-driven B-end requirement prototypes from local JSON.
